message:
Implement unified configuration (caam-a207)

- Updated `internal/config/spm_config.go` with full configuration structure for SmartRunner and alerts.
- Implemented defaults, validation (including regex compilation), and environment variable overrides.
- Updated `cmd/caam/cmd/config.go` to support setting new config values via CLI.
- Added tests for configuration logic.
- Fixes build errors in config command.
